data.title: TotalEnergies says world faces oil oversupply risk as prices rise again
data.description:
TotalEnergies has warned that global oil markets are tipping into excess supply, as Opec+ increases production while demand keeps weakening. The alert came Thursday from the company’s Q2 earnings call, where it laid out how Saudi Arabia and its Opec+ allies are adding barrels back into the system in an attempt to grab market share. […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/totalenergies-world-oil-oversupply-risk/

data.title: Spirit Blockchain Capital Establishes New Entity, SpiritReserve Group, and Plans to Raise Up to $500 Million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Spirit Blockchain Capital, a Canadian digital asset management and investment listed company, announced the launch of the Spirit Blockchain 2.0 strategy, intending to integrate a multi-token portfolio into its income strategy, and is expected to expand its income plan to three cryptocurrencies, BTC, ETH and SOL, in the fourth quarter of this year. In addition, Spirit Blockchain Capital also announced that it has officially established a new entity, SpiritReserve Group, and raised up to $500 million in funds in stages, aiming to create shareholder value through strategic investments in the digital asset field. (Globe Newswire)

data.title: Bitmine updates ETH holdings: 566,776 ETH in total, worth over $2 billion
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Bitmine officially updated its ETH holdings on the X platform. As of 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time on July 23, 2025 (11:59 today, Beijing Time), Bitmine held a total of 566,776 ETH, worth more than $2 billion.

data.title: Ji Hun Kim Appointed CEO of Cryptocurrency Innovation Committee
data.description: According to PANews, the Cryptocurrency Innovation Committee (CCI) has announced the appointment of Ji Hun Kim as its Chief Executive Officer. Kim has been serving as the President and Acting CEO of CCI since January 2025, following his previous role as the organization's Chief Legal and Policy Officer. In addition, SoFi, a prominent fintech and banking innovator, has officially joined the Cryptocurrency Innovation Committee.

data.title: The number of initial jobless claims in the United States for the week ending July 19 was 217,000, while the expected number was 226,000.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The number of initial jobless claims in the United States for the week ending July 19 was 217,000, with an expected number of 226,000 and a previous value of 221,000. (Jinshi)

data.title: Binance now supports USYC and cUSDO as OTC collateral
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Binance has now officially expanded its institutional OTC settlement service, adding support for two tokenized real-world assets (RWA) as collateral: USYC and cUSDO. Institutional users can now use these yield-bearing tokenized stable assets as collateral through Banking Triparty and MirrorRSV, while maintaining OTC custody and optimizing capital efficiency while trading securely on the Binance platform.

data.title: UK AI firm Satsuma Technology raises $135 million to build Bitcoin treasury
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Satsuma Technology, a London-based artificial intelligence company, has raised £100 million (about $135 million) to build a Bitcoin treasury, setting a record for UK Bitcoin treasury fundraising. The company said it had successfully completed fundraising in excess of the target amount and expected all committed funds to be in place within the next two weeks. If all funds are converted into Bitcoin, the acquisition will make Satsuma the second largest corporate Bitcoin holder in the UK, second only to The Smarter Web Company, which holds 1,600 BTC (worth about $190 million). (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Crypto industry asks Trump to stop JPMorgan and banks from ‘taxing’ access to payments data
data.description:
Cryptocurrency and financial technology industry groups are calling on President Donald Trump to intervene in the “coordinated attempt” by big banks, led by JPMorgan Chase, to undermine open banking regulations by imposing fees for accessing customer financial data. The plea was outlined in a letter sent on Wednesday to the White House, signed by ten […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/crypto-industry-asks-trump-stop-jpmorgan-tax/

data.title: Solana to Boost Block Capacity by 66% with SIMD-0286 Upgrade
data.description:
Solana plans to raise block capacity from 60M to 100M Compute Units under SIMD-0286, boosting throughput by 66% to reduce congestion.
source: https://cryptopotato.com/solana-to-boost-block-capacity-by-66-with-simd-0286-upgrade/

data.title: Binance to accept Circle’s stablecoin USYC as collateral for institutional clients
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Circle announced that Binance will begin accepting USYC (a stablecoin that shares profits with investors) as collateral for institutional clients. While many institutional traders using platforms such as Binance will use Bitcoin or other crypto assets as collateral, some traditional institutions are still reluctant to do so.
Catherine Chen, head of Binance VIP and institutional business, said that part of the reason is that the dismal collapse of FTX has made many people skeptical about providing collateral on exchanges. Binance is trying to solve this problem through a service called "Banking Triparty". The service involves Binance working with traditional banks to let them act as custodians and use assets held by banks as collateral for cryptocurrency transactions. She added that many partners are working with Binance to integrate USYC, which will provide faster settlement speeds. Binance also announced that it will integrate another yield-based stablecoin cUSDO. cUSDO is an abbreviation for OpenEden OpenDollar, which is issued by OpenEden Digital, an entity licensed and regulated in Bermuda. (Fortune)
